scripts.build: cd ../web && bunx vite build && cd ../desktop && bun run prepare:sidecar && tauri build
scripts.build:prod: cd ../web && VITE_API_BASE=https://agentparty.leeguoo.com bunx vite build && cd ../desktop && bun run prepare:sidecar && tauri build
scripts.build:xdream: cd ../web && VITE_API_BASE=https://agentparty.pwtk-dev.work bunx vite build && cd ../desktop && bun run prepare:sidecar && tauri build
scripts.typecheck: cd ../web && bunx tsc --noEmit && cd ../desktop/src-tauri && cargo check
